name: MANTIS
description: Mantis uses her impressive mental abilities and her penchant for plant control to anchor any team she fights alongside. Her powers tap into a limitless flow of life energy, gently nourishing everything she touches.
lore: Mantis always knows exactly how you're feeling, thanks to her strong empathic powers. Her alien ability to alter the emotions of others comes in handy on the battlefield, but Mantis only finds true happiness for herself when she is with her fellow Guardians of the Galaxy. After being captured by the Collector and put on display at his theme park, Mantis managed to escape with the help of her fellow captives, Sai and Jeff. Now, Mantis travels the spaceways in hopes of reuniting with her team, while welcoming other displaced souls into the Guardians' found family.

base_stats.Life Orb Cooldown: 4 charges, with each charge taking 3s to recharge

stats.Life Orb Cooldown: 4 charges, with each charge taking 3s to recharge

abilities.name: Life Energy Blast
abilities.description: Fire an energy thorn and regain one Life Orb after a critical hit.

abilities.name: Soul Resurgence
abilities.description: Release energy around her while moving, providing Healing Over Time and Movement Boosts for surrounding allies. Excess healing converts to Bonus Health

stats.Casting: Persistent spell field that surrounds the caster

abilities.name: Spore Slumber
abilities.description: Throw a spore to Sedate the nearest enemy

stats.Casting: Single-cast projectile with delayed impact that also generates a spell field
stats.Special Effect: A Mantis illusions will manifest beside the sedated heroes. Allies can attack this illusion to awaken the affected hero

abilities.name: Allied Inspiration
abilities.description: Consume Life Orbs to grant allies a Damage Boost

abilities.name: Natural Anger
abilities.description: Consume Life Orbs to grant herself a Damage Boost

stats.Duration: 8s (the duration cannot stack; repeatedly casting will only refresh the duration)

abilities.name: Healing Flower
abilities.description: Consume Life Orbs to grant allies Healing Over Time

stats.Special Effect: Healing Flower provides two types of healing effects: One-time Healing and Healing Over Time
stats.Healing Over Time Amount: 10 + 2.5% of the target's maximum Health per second

abilities.name: Nature's Favor
abilities.description: Receive a Movement Boost when not injured and Healing Over Time when consuming Life Orbs

stats.Special Effect: Consume Life Orbs to receive Healing Over Time

received.name: Heavenly Guardian
received.description: Mantis enhances Groot's wooden walls and Loki's Rune Stones with life energy. Groot can additionally unleash a Flower Wall, which, when in Flora Colossus state, restores health to random nearby allies and grants them Damage Reduction. Loki's Rune Stones grant allies within Regeneration Domain a Damage Boost

base.description: Recasting Healing Flower on a teammate with the effect enhances and spreads the healing aura.

stats.Special effect: When Star-Lord is selected as her Team-Up partner, enhance the healing output of Healing Flower from 10 + 2.5% of target's max Health/s to 15 + 3% of target's max Health/s

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Star-Lord, using Healing Flower on any teammate instantly triggers the enhanced Spell Field and healing effect.

stats.Special Effect: Casting Healing Flower on any ally enhances and spreads the healing effect
stats.Special effect: When Star-Lord is selected as her Team-Up partner, enhance the healing output of Healing Flower from 10 + 2.5% of target's max Health/s to 15 + 3% of target's max Health/s

base.description: Upon defeat, Mantis can freely move as a soul, healing nearby allies, and reforge her body at a chosen spot. After using Natural Anger, the effect of Nature's Favor is enhanced, increasing the amount of healing provided.

stats.Special effect: When Adam Warlock is selected as her Team-Up partner, the Nature's Favor passive effect is enhanced. After casting Natural Anger (and ONLY while Natural Anger is active), increase her self-healing from 12.5/s to 17.5/s

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Adam Warlock, her soul state can forge Soul Bond with nearby teammates, granting Healing Over Timeand distributing damage taken across the bond.

stats.Special effect: When Adam Warlock is selected as her Team-Up partner, the Nature's Favor passive effect is enhanced. After casting Natural Anger (and ONLY while Natural Anger is active), increase her self-healing from 12.5/s to 17.5/s
